author: Yoma
content: UwU such nice game ,need some improvement. but what wasted it , other region cant make top up so sad

author: Rolando Godefoy Leal
content: The game is upgrade yet, maybe I will change my opinion in a few month. Nevertheless, the game evolves on good way.

author: Tehiru
content:
Not recommend.
Hard to get featured units, needs too much time invested in order to get accustomed to the mechanics. And for each hero build a single piece of item in early game can greatly influence the outcome of a match. 
Pros 
New units from your favorite manga/anime
Cons 
Everyone wants to take that broken unit
Nobody wants to play team
Report system is broken
Playing team is mostly boring and time consuming
Featured units are too hard to get, especially as a f2p

author: GayLordUWU
content: i can play genshin totally fine but i couldn't play this game and even crash from the game, if this ain't the game problem then I'm probably insane. But judge by other reviews, I'm not

author: Detective Shiba
content: only issue i have with this game is that there is only 1 server and its pretty bad, i keep getting lag and it affects my game experience. they need to open more server for other countries to have better and smoother game play

author: Kusanaii
content: I cant even play the game properly because of the FK piece of garbage network on this game. I measured my wifi in the game it said 45ms all the time BUT when i play ranked, it lagging as shit (i recommend dont play this game until the network been fixed)

content: Emulators are not supported, what is this shit.

author: FoxyErya
content:
I don't know what to type here. I don't even know what should I rate this game.

As I installed the game, whenever I want to load the resources, it stops and the game kick me out to my home screen. The loading screen is already wasting my time. Even made my UI System stopped for a while. After relauching the game for three times, it crashed. So I don't even have any chance to play or even see it. 

The trailers and gameplays from other people looks promising though. 

For those who wants to play the game, there's an English language download patch. Good luck, I guess. But before agreeing the terms and conditions (the first text box in Chinese language), make sure to scroll all the way to down first. Or you won't go anywhere.
